testcase.name: test_admin_login

failure.message: AssertionError: Login response should contain token assert 'token' in {'access_token': 'eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJzdWIiOiJhZG1pbkBzdWl0c2luZGlhLmNvbSIsImV4cCI6MTc3Mjc5Mjc0NX0.4MqwbnvydEXPSD2efDqjRv2ghUiPKuzEyauc4aIADco', 'token_type': 'bearer', 'user': {'email': 'admin@suitsindia.com', 'full_name': 'Admin User', 'is_admin': True, 'permissions': {'all': True}, ...}}

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_sub_style_options.py:139: in test_admin_login assert "token" in data, "Login response should contain token" E AssertionError: Login response should contain token E assert 'token' in {'access_token': 'eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJzdWIiOiJhZG1pbkBzdWl0c2luZGlhLmNvbSIsImV4cCI6MTc3Mjc5Mjc0NX0.4MqwbnvydEXPSD2efDqjRv2ghUiPKuzEyauc4aIADco', 'token_type': 'bearer', 'user': {'email': 'admin@suitsindia.com', 'full_name': 'Admin User', 'is_admin': True, 'permissions': {'all': True}, ...}}

testcase.name: test_reseller_login
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_sub_style_options.py:227: in test_reseller_login assert response.status_code == 200, f"Reseller login failed: {response.status_code} - {response.text}" E AssertionError: Reseller login failed: 405 - {"detail":"Method Not Allowed"} E assert 405 == 200 E + where 405 = <Response [405]>.status_code
